scripts.test:dry: node -e "process.env.DRY_RUN='true'; process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGIN='*'; process.env.SEND_FULL_TO_TELEGRAM='true'; const fs=require('node:fs'); const {handler}=require('./index'); handler({httpMethod:'POST', headers:{origin:'http://127.0.0.1:5173'}, body:fs.readFileSync('./sample-note.json','utf8')}).then((r)=>{console.log(r.statusCode); console.log(r.body); if(r.statusCode!==200) process.exit(1)})"
